name_local: Mercato di Testaccio e Quartiere Testaccio

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso del mercato, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so del mer-KAH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the corner, after the traffic light.

responses.english: At the corner, after the traffic light.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove posso mangiare il supplì, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh POS-soh man-JAH-reh eel soop-PLEE, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora apre il mercato, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah kay O-ra AH-pray eel mer-KAH-to, per fa-VO-ray

likely_response.local: Apre alle sette, ma i banchi variano.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHP-reh AHL-leh SEHT-teh MAH EE BAHNCH-ee vah-ree-AH-noh
likely_response.translation_en: Opens at seven, but stalls vary.

responses.english: Opens at seven, but stalls vary.
responses.phonetic: AHP-reh AHL-leh SEHT-teh MAH EE BAHNCH-ee vah-ree-AH-noh
responses.local: Apre alle sette, ma i banchi variano.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove sono i bagni pubblici, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh SOH-noh ee BAH-nyee POOB-blee-chee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: In fondo a destra, vicino uscita.
likely_response.pronunciation: EEN FOHN-doh AH DEH-strah vee-CHEE-noh oo-SHEE-tah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back on the right, near exit.

responses.english: At the back on the right, near exit.
responses.phonetic: EEN FOHN-doh AH DEH-strah vee-CHEE-noh oo-SHEE-tah
responses.local: In fondo a destra, vicino uscita.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si può pagare con carta, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see pwoh pah-GAH-reh kon KAR-tah, per fah-VOH-reh
